source_pr.title: *: fix data race and enable race for tidb-server
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: Weizhen Wang <wangweizhen@pingcap.com>

<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #38178

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
enable race for tidb-server binary and run it with mysql-test.

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: DATA RACE risk: building KV requests using a session/global InfoSchema can race with concurrent schema updates; use transaction InfoSchema snapshot instead.
failure_signature: DATA RACE: concurrent access to InfoSchema during KV request build (race detector).
root_cause_explanation: When building the KV request, `TableReaderExecutor` previously used `e.ctx.GetInfoSchema()`, which can change concurrently with schema updates and trigger race detector failures in `tidb-server` race runs. The patch switches to `sessiontxn.GetTxnManager(e.ctx).GetTxnInfoSchema()` so request building uses the transaction-level InfoSchema snapshot, avoiding concurrent/unsafe access to the session/global InfoSchema.
fix_pattern: Use transaction InfoSchema snapshot when building KV requests (`GetTxnInfoSchema()` via `sessiontxn.GetTxnManager`) to avoid races with concurrent schema updates.

evidence: evidence: *: fix data race and enable race for tidb-server
